",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_working"}]," (content-column FTS5) with automatic triggers for INSERT, UPDATE, and DELETE."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Vector Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Embeddings are stored separately in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_episodes"}]," (sqlite-vec, int8[384]). They are generated at recall time and are ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"not"}]," a column in the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"working_memory"}]," table."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Eviction Policy"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When Working Memory reaches capacity, entries are evicted by a composite score:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance weighting"}],": Higher importance = lower eviction priority"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recency"}],": Recently created or recalled entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$L3",": Entries with higher ","$L4"," are protected"]}],"\n","$L5","\n"]}],"\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc"],["$Ld"],"$Le"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"CtKuu4RqekBg7GLl7uVJl"}
3:["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recall frequency"}]
4:["$","code",null,{"children":"recall_count"}]
5:["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Composite score"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score = importance * recency_factor * recall_factor"}]]}]
6:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Consolidation Path"}]
7:["$","$Lf",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[New Entry] -->|insert| WM[Working Memory]\n  WM -->|TTL/2 age trigger| C{Consolidation}\n  C -->|group by source| S[Summarize via LLM/AAAK]\n  S -->|promote| EM[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|evict originals| DEL[Evicted]\n"}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"API Reference"}]
9:["$","$L10",null,{"code":"# Store a memory\nmem.remember(content, importance=0.5, source=\"user\")\n\n# Recall memories (FTS5 + vector hybrid)\nresults = mem.recall(query, top_k=10)\n\n# Update a memory\nmem.update(id, content=None, importance=None)\n\n# Delete a single memory\nmem.forget(id)\n","language":"python"}]
